description_long: This is a robust, rectangular safe box with a matte black finish and metallic gold trim accentuating its edges. The front face features a prominent vertical handle and a circular knob, both in gold, suggesting a secure locking mechanism. The body is solid and heavy, with no visible seams except for the door outline on the front. The safe stands on four short, sturdy feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. The sides and back are plain, with the gold trim providing a visual frame. There are no visible brand markings, ventilation slots, or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian and secure design.
description: A heavy, rectangular black safe box with gold trim, a vertical handle, and a circular knob on the front. The design is solid, secure, and utilitarian.
description_view_0: The back view shows a plain, solid black surface framed by gold trim, with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the gold trim running vertically along the edges, with a partial view of the handle and knob protruding from the front.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the gold vertical handle and circular knob, set against a black door framed by gold trim, indicating the main access point.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with gold trim along the edges and no additional features visible.
attribute_handle_design: vertical fixed bar handle, front left, metallic gold
